title: HOME REPAIR ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE RURAL DEVELOPMENT OREGON STATE HOME REPAIR ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Section 504 Home Repair Loan and Grant Program helps homeowners in eligible rural areas remove health and safety hazards, repair, improve, or modernize their homes, and make them accessible to people with disabilities. The maximum loan amount is $40,000 (the term is 20 years at 1%), and the maximum grant amount is $10,000. Loans and grants can be combined for assistance. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 1801 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: -Live in a rural area (population of 35,000 or less) -Be the homeowner and occupy the house -Unable to obtain affordable credit elsewhere -Household income that does not exceed the limit by county -Grants: Age 62 and older and not be able to repay a repair loan -Manufactured homes in parks do not qualify for mortgage loans Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (866) 923-5626 2 504... Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (866) 923-5626 ext 2 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Grants/Loans Home Rehabilitation Programs Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - WILLAMETTE NATIONAL FOREST FIREWOOD PERMITS DISASTER SERVICES - EMERGENCY FARM LOANS HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 502 DIRECT HOME LOAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE RURAL DEVELOPMENT OREGON STATE
